creator: jclarke@cisco.com
text:
Netatalk has reached version 1.5pre5 at its new location on 
	Sourceforge (http://netatalk.sourceforge.net).  I have tested
	compilation, and execution by hacking around at the Makefiles and
	C source.  It works well, but I have not made official patches as
	I'm not sure my hacks cover everything.
